flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ashland University rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.1k → $31.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ashland University rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.1k → $31.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ashland University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 2.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Ashland University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.2k vs 2.9k).
